message:
🐛 Fix Kagenti card flicker in demo mode (#672)

When in demo mode, the initial state already contains demo data with
isLoading=false. Previously, fetchData() would still call setData()
with a new getDemoAgents() array, triggering unnecessary re-renders
that caused visible flicker.

Now fetchData() returns early when in demo mode without any state
updates, eliminating the flicker on console.kubestellar.io.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
